# ALORA — Software, Automatización e IA | globalalora.com

## Company
ALORA is a digital development agency based in Argentina, specializing in software, AI, automation, and web development for businesses worldwide.

## Services
- Custom software and web platforms
- AI-powered customer service agents and chatbots (WhatsApp, web)
- Business automation with Make.com, n8n, Zapier
- Web design, landing pages, and e-commerce
- Google Ads management

## Key product
LIDIA — WhatsApp appointment management for health and aesthetic clinics (soylidia.com)

## Technology stack
Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Vercel, Groq (llama-3.3-70b), GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, WhatsApp Business API, HubSpot, Salesforce, Make.com, n8n

## Markets
Argentina, Mexico, Spain, Colombia, Chile — serving clients worldwide
